name: Microwave Creamy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, milk, butter, and a dash of salt in a 3-quart microwave-safe bowl. Cover loosely with wax paper.
2. Microwave on high for 4 minutes.
3. Uncover and microwave for an additional 10 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
4. Continue microwaving, stirring every 2 minutes, until the candy thermometer reads 234 to 240 degrees (soft ball stage).
5. Stir in marshmallows and chocolate chips, and nuts if using. Stir vigorously until creamy and slightly glossy.
6. Spread mixture in a buttered 11x7 pan. Refrigerate for 2 hours or until set.
